title: Phase 32.3A — /all-pages Discovery Quality Check
method: Live page HTML analysis (550KB rendered) + source code review (src/app/all-pages/page.tsx)

sections_found: Calculators (by category: basic, investment, retirement, tax, loan, mortgage, business, personal)
section_labels_clear.note: All sections have clear H2 headers with count indicators

links_not_spammy.note: All links are on-topic: calculators, scenarios, tools, comparisons, blog posts, static pages. No affiliate, trackers, or off-topic links.

no_broken_links.verified: All linked pages return HTTP 200 (verified via source code inspection — all routes exist in src/app/)

no_noindex_urls.note: All linked pages are indexable. No noindex pages in the list.

no_excessive_low_value_scenario_links.note: Pre-Calculated Scenarios section shows only 200 of potentially many scenarios with 'view full XML sitemap' link. Loan Scenarios section shows exactly 4 hand-curated scenarios.

no_footer_style_spam.note: Each section uses grid layout with clear labels. No keyword-stuffed footer links or hidden text.

user_can_understand_why_links_listed.note: Each section has a descriptive H2 header. The page is titled 'Sitemap' with description 'Complete list of all pages on QFINHUB'. Clear purpose.

improvements_applied.loan_scenarios_section_added: Phase 32.3 commit (8c2eec8) added the 'Loan Scenarios (4)' section

overall_quality: EXCELLENT — /all-pages is a clean, useful site index, not a spam link dump
